message:
fix: improve SQLite concurrency for parallel br operations

- Strengthen write transaction retry: 8 retries with 50ms base + jitter
- Switch WAL checkpoint from TRUNCATE to PASSIVE to avoid blocking
- Add journal_size_limit (32MB) and disable wal_autocheckpoint
- Prevents "database is busy" errors under concurrent agent access

Closes #219

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
